subTitle: 「幸せ」ってなんだか不思議，明日のこと、好きになれる。
allHead: <script src='https://blog.meekdai.com/Gmeek/plugins/GmeekVercount.js'></script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var interval = setInterval(function() { var footer = document.getElementById('footer2'); if (footer) { if (!document.getElementById('customLink')) { var link = document.createElement('a'); link.id = 'customLink'; link.href = 'https://icp.gov.moe/?keyword=20262514'; link.innerHTML = '萌ICP备20262514号'; link.style.marginLeft = '0px'; link.target = '_blank'; footer.appendChild(document.createTextNode(' • ')); footer.appendChild(link); } clearInterval(interval); } }, 100); });</script>
